# Cubism Core

Place the officially licensed Cubism 4/5 Web runtime here using either layout:

`live2dcubismcore.min.js`

or

`CubismSdkForWeb-5-r.5/Core/live2dcubismcore.min.js`

Obtain the file from the official Live2D Cubism SDK for Web package. The
framework and renderer dependencies are installed through npm, but Cubism Core
is distributed under Live2D's own license and is intentionally not copied from
an unofficial package.
